sources.title: Nearly a repeat of the goal! Spence's long-range shot from the edge of the box saved, Saka's follow-up effort blocked again
[Highlights] So close! Isak's left-footed strike just over the bar
[Highlights] Missed opportunity! Madueke forces a cross, O'Riley fails to connect
Pure Enjoyment Version Replay
[Highlights] Farewell Haaland? Haaland substituted in second half of extra time, Larsen comes on as substitute
[Highlights] Teammates again next season! Haaland pushes away Andersen after being tightly marked
[Highlights] A speculative attempt! Nusa cuts inside and fires, saved comfortably by Pickford
[Highlights] Bought tickets early? Camera shows Brazilian legends Ronaldo and Kaka watching from the stands
[Highlights] It's you three again! England fans cosplay as cute lions and celebrate the equalizer with raised arms
[Highlights] Spence's byline突破 draws penalty, referee cancels it after VAR review
[Pre-match] Silent tribute! Both teams observe a minute of silence for South African international Jayden Adams before the game
[Pre-match] Tuchel: Players give their all for the jersey, fully believe the public will love it
[Pre-match] Solbakken: Kane is England's top scorer, fully prepared for penalty shootout
[Goal] A sudden strike! Rogers' powerful shot saved, Bellingham's alert follow-up finds the net
[Behind the Scenes] No more napping! Feng Xiaoting and Su Dong joke that water breaks are official breathers
[Highlights] A look says it all! Haaland marks former teammate Bellingham, both share a smile
[Highlights] That look could kill! Haaland's 'quality check' glare at Man City teammate sends chills
[Highlights] Oshoanes delivers pinpoint cross, Ajer's header hits the crossbar and bounces out
[Highlights] Give a brother some face? Bellingham holds the ball for a penalty, Haaland taps his head
Battle for the World's Best Striker! Feng Xiaoting: Kane is team-oriented and all-round, Haaland has all the characteristics of a center forward
[Highlights] Sustained pressure! Odegaard gets the ball in the attacking third and shoots, saved by Pickford
[Post-match] No气馁 after defeat! Haaland hugs Bellingham, James and other England players after the game
[Highlights] What a shame! Bellingham's brilliant pass ruled offside, he kneels and covers face in regret
Shanghai Dialect Replay (Chen Bozhou)
[Pre-match] Zhang Lu: Argentina still needs to attack down the flanks; if they can't break through, use high crosses
[Pre-match] Hate to see Haaland go! Yang Jian: I feel sorry for Haaland's elimination
No power at all! Embolo's header saved by Martinez with a diving catch
[Highlights] No real test! Riedle's free kick easily caught by Martinez
[Highlights] Messi's corner kick initiates attack, Lindelof's volley saved by Kobel's brilliant stop
Zhan Jun & Zhang Lu: Argentina's defense has vulnerabilities, Lisandro Martinez lacks height
Freuler's narrow-angle free kick attempt, slightly off target due to poor technique
Too hasty! Messi's through ball, Molina's long-range shot goes wide
Sun Baojie: Argentina are experienced! They disrupted Switzerland's attacking rhythm
[Highlights] Attack gains momentum! Xhaka's long-range shot saved by Martinez
[Highlights] Messi cuts inside and passes, Mac Allister's powerful shot takes a deflection off Elvedi and goes wide
[Highlights] Zhang Lu's halftime analysis: Switzerland not applying enough pressure, Argentina must be cautious of mistakes
[Highlights] Missed the target! Messi cuts inside and shoots wide
[Highlights] Sow fires a shot from outside the box, Martinez holds it firmly
[Pre-match] Live from the first scene! Both Argentina and Switzerland have arrived at the stadium
[Behind the Scenes] Zhan Jun: Messi walks 76% of the time, but the remaining 24% is deadly
[Pre-match] How did they get all right?! Three commentators pass the ultimate quiz challenge
Embolo's costly mistake leads to turnover, Álvarez's first touch too heavy wastes chance
[Highlights] Don't lose because of poor high balls! Zhang Lu's words come true as N'Doye's header creates danger
[Highlights] Argentina's backline in danger, Lisandro Martínez makes crucial block on N'Doye's shot
[Highlights] Embolo recklessly brings down Paredes, referee promptly shows yellow card
[Pre-match] Li Xin: Norway did very well to draw in regular time
[Highlights] Embolo's quick run almost leads to a one-on-one, Martínez's sliding tackle clears the danger
The decision is correct! Sun Baojie: Salah's fall in the penalty area was not a foul
[Goal] Suspense returns! N'Doye cuts into the box and scores from a tight angle into the far corner
